quote: You can't migrate what you can't find.
quote_context: The README presents CryptoScan as part of the QRAMM Toolkit and uses the quote while describing lack of visibility into cryptographic algorithms in codebases, configurations, and dependencies.
presentation_guidance: Cite the quote as CSNP CryptoScan README (QRAMM Toolkit), not as a NIST or generic QRAMM standard quote.
Use it as a framing statement for cryptographic discovery: migration requires first finding cryptographic usage.
Do not imply that the quote by itself proves our implementation scope.

official_evidence.finding: The README identifies CryptoScan as part of the QRAMM Toolkit.
The README contains the exact quote and explains codebase cryptographic visibility as the surrounding context.
